sql_array: CREATE TABLE e_example (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO e_example (id, value) VALUES (1, e()), (2, e() + 1.0);
UPDATE e_example SET value = e() * 2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, value + e() AS new_value FROM e_example;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_entries, AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM e_example WHERE value < e();
